component.name: RoN Mod Manager
component.summary: Mod manager for Ready or Not

description.p: RoN Mod Manager lets you browse, install, and manage mods for the tactical shooter Ready or Not, with support for Nexus Mods and mod.io modpacks.

ul.li: Add deep-link support and userscript to add download buttons to nexus and modio
Add Ctrl+I incognito mode for screenshot-safe dummy mod list
Remove redundant Maps collection from incognito dummy data
Automated screenshots
Auto-vendor before dev/build when Cargo.lock changes
Show current app version in settings App Updates card
Assign modpack addon relationships immediately as each file installs
Pre-fill modpack URL and show Update button when revisiting Add Modpack
Auto-generate release notes from conventional commits
Install git-cliff binary directly to avoid EOL Debian Buster image
Use gh CLI to download git-cliff to handle versioned asset filename
Autosave settings, remove Save All Settings button
Skip browser open if Nexus download file already exists
Refresh mod list progressively as each mod installs
Reuse matching ~/Downloads files when adding self-hosted modpack mods
Don't persist window geometry on native Wayland
Pause auto-scroll when user scrolls up in log panel, resume on scroll to bottom
Fix flatpak remote-add command to use temp file instead of /dev/stdin
Distribute Flatpak via GitHub Pages OSTree remote
Regenerate Cargo.lock as part of npm version hook
Surface missing FLATPAK_GPG_PRIVATE_KEY secret with clear error
Sign Flatpak bundles with dedicated GPG key to fix update signature mismatch
Tolerate flatpak segfault after successful bundle install
Baseline repository snapshot
Implement modpack and config state services
Add config and game IPC handlers
Add modpack and collections IPC commands
Add auth, mods, and sharing handlers
Add typed tauri command wrappers
Wire dashboard to tauri commands
Add multi-page app shell and navigation
Implement manifest-based mod installation flow
Add progress event system for mod installation
Add progress modal and install button with event listening
Format progress event emissions
Connect Install Mods button to progress modal with event listeners
Add changelog and multi-platform bundle configuration
Add HTML directory fallback for manifest discovery
Format modpack service and commands code
Add collection-based installation filtering and modpack export
Implement profile system and game launcher
Add github-based auto-updater and installer-style icon concept
Add flatpak packaging and switch updater endpoint to savagecore.uk
Standardize app identifier to uk.savagecore and keep github updater
Apply theme correctly and improve Linux Wayland startup
Bump actions/upload-artifact from 4 to 7
Bump actions/setup-node from 4 to 6
Bump actions/checkout from 4 to 6
Fix lint
Group dependabot updates by ecosystem
Install system dependencies for lint-backend job
Allow building of esbuild and wc_toolkit
Align header controls and optimize pnpm workspace discovery
Feature additions and dependency updates
Replace FAB with inline add mod button in mods filter bar
Add success color variants and update button hover state
Overhaul mods page buttons and add confirmation modal
Ignore src-tauri/target in .gitignore
Fix sources dropdown height to match search input
Fix flatpak and windows build failures
Improve add mod modal UX
Resolve CI build failures
Correct batch install progress bar behavior
Ignore generated flatpak rust-analyzer script
Streamline mod add flow and remove debug logging
Add profile collections workflow
Bump gh actions
(updates): Prevent spamming update check
Switch from pnpm to npm for flatpak builds
Bump the cargo-dependencies group across 1 directory with 4 updates
Bump the npm-dependencies group across 1 directory with 6 updates
Bump the cargo-dependencies group across 1 directory with 4 updates
Modpack export working
Import working
Re-add source_url to nexus mod
Sub-mod or add-on attached to a mod, like world gen files for maps
Status stuck when exporting modpack + add verification of copy
Add support for `.bank` files
Add context menu when right clicking a mod, right now it has add to collection only
Fix ci
Make local linting match ci
Fix local flatpak build
Script to move dev "database" to production
7z archive support
Speed up local prettier check
Improve collection management UX
Mod tagging support for filtering list
Warn when adding to an existing modpack
Correct collection enabled state
Unify collection and mod management modals
Tag persistance
Ability to rename collections
Allow setting a collection colour to differentiate the pills
Bubble newly added mods to the top
Unify archive install progress message to "Installing archive: {filename}"
Serialize file drop installs through a single worker queue
Add Nexus Mods download support with browser fallback for non-premium
Remove empty style block causing Tailwind v4 to misparse JS imports as CSS
Guard against Tailwind v4 misparsing Svelte virtual CSS modules as JS
Serialize mod link installs through a single worker queue
Always pick latest active Nexus file and add cancel for non-premium wait
Add Manage Add-ons and Edit/Add Link to mod context menu
Add multi selection to mods for managing collections and tags
Use xdg-open on Linux for launch game command so Flatpak works
Bump the cargo-dependencies group across 1 directory with 4 updates
Bump the npm-dependencies group across 1 directory with 8 updates
Do not update `prettier-plugin-svelte` to `4.0.0` it's broken
Speed up modpack export/import
Show installed date and add sort options
Prefer Nexus CDN download during modpack import for premium users
Support ReadyOrNot-rooted override mods (e.g. intro movie replacements)
Replace INI-based intro skip with movie file removal
Warn on Map mods missing world gen data and add sort option
Mark mod as broken with optional note
Store intro skip preference in config and enforce on launch
Remove mod.io subscription system
Route temp extraction/downloads to disk to avoid Flatpak tmpfs exhaustion
Fix uninstall all and add bulk uninstall for multiselect
Skip download and install on modpack import when hash matches
Use modpack.json URL instead of ronmod.pack when fetching modpacks
Clean up mod membership from tags/collections on uninstall
Restore download progress on modpack import
Show pak file selection modal for multi-pak archives
Persist pak file selection in modpack format
In-app SFTP sync to remote server
Show shield icon on mods that contain game file overrides
Make collection and tag pills clickable to filter mod list
Window behaviour settings — minimise/quit on launch and close-to-tray
Bundle libayatana-appindicator3 in Flatpak to fix crash on launch
Force CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR=lib for Ayatana Flatpak modules
Resolve Flatpak bundle pipeline failures and warnings
Remove emdash slop
Reduce sync log verbosity and sort file listing
Add no-world-gen flag to suppress missing world gen warning for maps
Add sort by installed file count
Add import log panel and footer progress toggle
Replace modpack modal backdrop with floating panel
Extract shared LogPanel component
AddModpackModal -> AddModpackPanel
Add separator before modpack summary lines
Add separator between modpack preamble and first mod
Replace SyncProgressModal with SyncPanel, add upload speed
Clear import log pill when cancelling Nexus free download
Show file variant selection modal for mods with multiple MAIN files
Persist Nexus file variant choice, add free-download modal, fix modpack import
Backup and restore of .ini mods
Background Nexus free downloads during modpack import
Log waiting status when manual Nexus download modal is shown
Prefer self-hosted download for non-premium Nexus mods during modpack import
Minimisable log panels with footer pills
Bump the npm-dependencies group with 4 updates
Bump the cargo-dependencies group
Nexus API key Remove button now clears the key
Replace metadata refresh pop-in bar with InfoPanel
Install system dependencies in release CI for Linux
Fall back to hard link or copy when symlinks lack privilege on Windows
Remove invalid --allow=network flag from release Flatpak CI
Use Steam URI to launch game on Windows
Sync game folder before deleting manifests in uninstall all
Add first time wizard to guide users through api key setup
Compute hash when downloading
Populate source_url, tags, collections and addons on modpack import
Disable broken/disabled mods correctly on modpack import
Close dismisses and clears log panels, Minimise hides only
Stream SFTP uploads instead of buffering entire file in memory
Full app name in title bar, one command to build and install flatpak
Preserve and correctly import broken mod notes from modpack
Sync version across all three manifests via npm version hook
Skip git commit/tag on npm version, drop redundant git add
